focus: Multi-syllable word stress patterns — which syllable to emphasize
focus_ar: أنماط التشديد — أي مقطع تشدّد في الكلمات متعددة المقاطع
arabic_challenge: Arabic has stress but it follows different rules. English stress is less predictable and CHANGES meaning (PREsent vs preSENT). Wrong stress makes you harder to understand even if your sounds are correct.

daily_drills.task: Say each word. The FIRST syllable should be louder, longer, and higher in pitch. Tap your hand on the stressed syllable.
Say each verb. The SECOND syllable should be louder. Compare: PREsent (noun) vs preSENT (verb).
Sort: which have stress on syllable 1 vs syllable 2? Tap the stressed syllable while saying each word.

pairs.sentence: I want to reCORD a new REcord.
They won't perMIT me without a PERmit.

daily_drills.task: Say each pair. Feel how stress MOVES between noun and verb. Record all 5 example sentences.

daily_drills.focus: Stress in sentences (content words vs function words)
daily_drills.principle: Content words (nouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs) are STRESSED. Function words (a, the, is, to, of, and) are UNSTRESSED (reduced to schwa).

examples.sentence: I WANT to GO to the STORE.
She LIVES in a BEAUTIFUL CITY.
We're GOING to LEARN ENGLISH EVERY DAY.

daily_drills.task: Read each sentence. Make stressed words LOUDER and LONGER. Make unstressed words quick and quiet.

daily_drills.focus: Read a paragraph with correct stress
daily_drills.paragraph: EVERY MORning I WAKE up EARly. I beLIEVE that PRACtice makes PERfect. The MOST imPORtant THING is to be conSIStent. I reMEMber when I beGAN — it was DIFficult. But NOW I can underSTAND MUCH MORE. toMORrow I will conTINue. My GOAL is to SPEAK BEAUtifully and CONfidently.
daily_drills.task: Record this paragraph. Emphasize the capitalized syllables. Make everything else quick and quiet.

daily_drills.passage: I believe that learning English is important. Every morning I practice — it's difficult but beautiful. I remember when I began this journey. Tomorrow will be better. The people around me are supportive. My family understands my decision. I want to present myself confidently and produce results. I will never forget how this feels. I enjoy the process.
daily_drills.task: Record. Mark stress on every word with 2+ syllables. Check: did you stress the RIGHT syllable in each one?
